arts.ttl: 'Title race on' - how Odegaard & Saka are keeping Arsenal hopes alive
arts.sum: As Arsenal move second with an emphatic win at West Ham, BBC Sport looks at how Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka are keeping their title hopes alive.

arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva sends ex-Arsenal stars message in bid to get one over on Tottenham
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM vs FULHAM: Marco Silva wants his former Gunners to thrive when the Cottagers lock horns with Spurs on Sunday in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp questions Arsenal's 'strange' penalty decision during 5-2 rout of West Ham - with both Bukayo Saka and Martin Odegaard on target from the spot
arts.sum: Arsenal were awarded a second penalty on the stroke of the break after Hammers goalkeeper Likas Fabianski was penalised for a punch on Gabriel, with Saka converting from the spot.

arts.ttl: Saka and Ødegaard’s special relationship has Arsenal humming | Barney Ronay
arts.athr: Barney Ronay at the London Stadium
arts.sum: No Arsenal player is benefiting more from the captain’s return than his ruthless buddy on the wing, as West Ham found out Oh for heavens’s sake, get a room. Actually don’t. This is, on reflection, a global spectator sport. But show a little restraint. People are watching. Including, it seemed for much of the first half at the London Stadium, the entire West Ham defence. There were times during those 49 wild minutes when Bukayo Saka and Martin Ødegaard seemed to be playing pretty much in the same pocket of air, like a pair of hummingbirds, beautifully conjoined. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides Gabriel Magalhaes injury update and explains Arsenal substitution
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes scored Arsenal's opening goal during their 5-2 win against West Ham on Saturday but was replaced by team-mate Jakub Kiwior at half-time due to injury

arts.ttl: Huge brawl breaks out as punches thrown during West Ham vs Arsenal in ugly scenes
arts.sum: Arsenal's win over West Ham was marred by a huge brawl breaking out among Hammers fans as their team fell four goals down with punches being thrown before stewards moved in

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp insists Bukayo Saka's improvements are 'FRIGHTENING' after the Arsenal star moved closer to breaking a Premier League record in the club's 5-2 win over West Ham
arts.sum: Saka was instrumental for the Gunners as they ran riot in the London derby, with his early corner finding Gabriel who duly headed home to put the visitors in front.

arts.ttl: 'He will not leave': President promises West Ham and Newcastle will not sign 27-goal striker
Arsenal injury update after key duo subbed off against West Ham
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says he has manage Gabriel Magalhães and Riccardo Calafiori’s minutes as both players are dealing with an injury ‘issue’. The Brazilian defender was taken off at halftime of the Gunners’ 5-2 win at West Ham United after receiving a punch in the head from goalkeeper Lukasz Fabianski as both men went […] The post Arsenal injury update after key duo subbed off against West Ham first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: West Ham unlucky with decisions against Arsenal - Lopetegui
arts.sum: West Ham boss Julen Lopetegui says his side were unlucky with on-field decisions following their 5-2 defeat to Arsenal in the Premier League at London Stadium.
